name: Do I need a lawyer for my work ladder fall injury?
description: Yes, for max benefits and third-party claims; contingency fee.[3]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work ladder fall injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, for max benefits and third-party claims; contingency fee.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, hire a workers' comp lawyer, especially if third-party liability like a defective ladder or general contractor fault exists.[2][3]

They maximize benefits, handle denials, and pursue extra damages beyond comp limits.[1] Free consultations common; no win, no fee.

- Complex fault determination.
- Insurance tactics to lowball.
- Multi-party suits.

Lawyers boost settlements 2-3x; find one local to your state rules.[2] Act before deadlines.
